knowledge_gaps: Export ban contagion (47 documented since 2007) creates non-linear EM credit deterioration with 10% supply shortfall producing 30-40% price spikes
Private credit has 8-12% agribusiness/food processing exposure with PE-backed leverage at 6.5-7.5x EBITDA, creating a hidden stress channel
Gold's credit cycle hedge role structurally repriced by central bank buying at 1,000+ tonnes annually, breaking the gold/real-rate model since 2022
Basis trade ($800B-$1T) and maturity wall connected through shared repo infrastructure creating a potential doom loop, with SEC clearing mandate (Q2 2026) as catalyst
HY default rate in higher-for-longer scenario
Biofuel mandates (~40% of corn demand, ~35% of soybean oil) create structural price floors that act as credit cycle rigidity in agriculture
Simultaneous WTI contango >$2 AND LME copper contango >$50/t as a cross-asset credit cycle indicator (3-for-3 with 0 false positives since 2000)
Long credit vol / short equity vol trade exploits cross-asset inconsistency with favorable payoff asymmetry
Agricultural credit stress (delinquencies 2.5-3.5%, farmland values -8-12% from peaks) as a leading indicator for the broader credit cycle
focus.instruction: This topic has been studied at overview level. Focus on: (1) specific subtopics listed, (2) closing identified knowledge gaps, (3) cross-topic interactions with connected topics, (4) edge cases and regime-dependent behavior.

monetary_policy.display_name: Monetary Policy Transmission & Central Bank Strategy
